pathlib/PurePath/joinpath.name: joinpath
pathlib/PurePath/joinpath.description: Calling this method is equivalent to combining the path with each of the given pathsegments in turn: >>> PurePosixPath('/etc').joinpath('passwd') PurePosixPath('/etc/passwd') >>> PurePosixPath('/etc').joinpath(PurePosixPath('passwd')) PurePosixPath('/etc/passwd') >>> PurePosixPath('/etc').joinpath('init.d', 'apache2') PurePosixPath('/etc/init.d/apache2') >>> PureWindowsPath('c:').joinpath('/Program Files') PureWindowsPath('c:/Program Files')

info.excerpt: Calling this method is equivalent to combining the path with each of the given pathsegments in turn: >>> PurePosixPath('/etc').joinpath('passwd') PurePosixPath('/etc/passwd') >>> PurePosixPath('/etc')...
